verses.text: A gensa bangin Topa in Sarah' tungah thupha pia a, a gensa bangin Sarah' tungah Topa in hih hi
Sarah gai a, ama tunga Pasian in a gensa hunin a teek zawhin Abraham tawh tapa khat nei hi
Abraham in Sarah tawh a neih ama tapa' min dingin Isaac a phuak hi
Pasian in ama tunga a thu piaksa bangin amah in ni giat a phak ciangin a tapa Isaac a vun a at hi
A tapa Isaac a suah ciangin Abraham kum za pha hi
Sarah in, “Pasian in kei-a' dingin nuamin nuihzakna ding hong bawlsak khin hi. A za peuhmah in nuamin hong nuihpih ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Amah in, “Sarah in nau nawi pia ding ci-in kua in Abraham' tungah gen ngei ding ahi hiam? Ahi zongin a teek khitin amah tawh tapa khat ka nei hi,” a ci hi.
Naupang khang a, nawi tawh hong kikhen ta hi. Isaac nawi tawh a kikhen ni ciangin Abraham in pawi lianpi khat bawl hi
Ahih hangin, Abraham tawh a neih Egypt mi Hagar' tapa in ama tapa Isaac a ciamnuih bawlna Sarah in a mu hi
Tua ahih ciangin amah in Abraham' kiangah, “Hih sila numei a tapa tawh lawnkhia in; bang hang hiam cih leh sila numei' tapa in ka tapa Isaac tawh gamh luahkhawm theilo ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Ama tapa' hangin Abraham' tungah thu nuam hetlo hi

Ahih hangin Pasian in Abraham' tungah, “Tangvalpa leh na sila numei' hangin lungkim loin om kei in. Sarah in nang' tunga hong gen peuhmah ama hong gen bangin gamta in. Bang hang hiam cih leh Isaac tawh na suanlekhakte' min kilo ding hi
Sila numei' tapa zong nangma ta mah ahih manin, minam khatin ka bawl ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin zingsangin Abraham tho baihin an leh tuithawl la-in Hagar pia a, ama liangko tungah naupang tawh suanin a sawlkhia hi. Amah paikhia a, Beersheba gam sungah a vak kawikawi hi
Thawl sunga tui a bei ciangin amah in sawlbawk nuai khatah naupang lawn hi

Tua ciangin amah pai-in a hoihkhop khat a gamla, thallot khat tan bangah a ta nungngatin a tusuk hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Naupang' sih hong musak kei in,” a ci hi. Amah nungngatin a tut laitakin naupang nakpi-in a kap hi

Pasian in naupang' kahna aw a za hi. Pasian' vantung mi in vantung panin Hagar sam a, ama kiangah, “Hagar aw, bang in hong lungkhamsak ahi hiam? Lau kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh naupang a omna munah a kahna awging Pasian in za hi
Dingin naupang la in la, na khut tawh kip takin len in. Bang hang hiam cih leh minam lian khatin amah ka bawl ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Pasian in ama mit hak sak a, amah in tuikhuk khat a mu hi. Amah pai-in tui tawh tuithawl dimin naupang a dawn sak hi
Pasian in tua naupang ompih a, amah khangto hi. Amah gamlakah teng a, thallot siampa khat hong suak hi
Paran gam sungah amah teng hi. A nu in Egypt gam panin ama-a' ding zi khat a la hi.
Tua hun laitakin Abimelek leh a galkap mangpa Fikol in Abraham' kiangah, “Na sepna khempeuhah Pasian in nang hong ompih hi

Tua ahih ciangin tu-in kei hita leh ka tate hita leh ka suanlekhakte hita leh tungah a manlopi-in hong bawlloin, nang tungah thuman tak tawh kong gamtat bangin keima tung leh tawlkhat na omna leitang tungah nong gamtatna dingin Pasian tawh kei tungah hong kiciam in,” a ci hi
Abraham in, “Ka kiciam ding hi,” a ci hi
Abimelek' nasemte in a suhsa tuikhuk tawh kisai thu Abraham in a lungkim lohna Abimelek' kiangah a gen ciangin
Abimelek in, “Kua in hih hiam ka thei kei hi. Nang nong gen kei a, keimah in tuni dong ka za nai kei hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Abraham in tuu leh bawngtalte la-in Abimelek pia a, tua mi nihte in thuciamna khat a bawl uh hi
Abraham in a tuuhon sung panin tuununo sagih tuam koih hi
Abimelek in Abraham' kiangah, “Hih na koihtuam tuununo sagihte bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Amah in, “Keimah in hih tuikhuk ka tawhna thu-ah nang in keima-a' dingin teci na hih theihna dingin nangmah in ka khutsung panin hih tuununo sagihte na la ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin tua mun Beersheba kici hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute gel tua munah thu kiciam uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Beersheba-ah thuciamna khat a bawl uh hi. Tua khit ciangin Abimelek leh a galkapmangpa Fikol, Filistia mite' leitangah ciahkik uh hi
Abraham in Beersheba-ah makeng kung khat suan a, tua lai munah Tawntung Pasian, Topa a bia hi
Filistia mite' leitangah Abraham, sauveipi sung peemta-in a om hi.
